page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.48xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors operating at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of threads to physical cores, this instance provides dedicated, non-shared execution resources per vCPU, eliminating resource contention from simultaneous multithreading.

The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage operations rely on network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers and low-latency communication for distributed environments.

Given its high core density and compute-to-memory ratio, the ecs.c9ae.48xlarge offers high resource density for parallel processing tasks. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs focuses its qualitative cost efficiency on pure CPU-bound workloads. This configuration is suitable for high-performance computing, large-scale build systems, batch processing, and compute-intensive simulations that require massive parallelization without high memory-per-core demands.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.48xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors running at 2.25 GHz. It features 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and relies entirely on network-attached storage as it contains no local storage. With a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps and KVM hypervisor virtualization, this instance is designed for high-throughput, parallelized workloads. The high core density and dedicated CPU allocation make it suitable for compute-heavy tasks such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale compilation pipelines.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.48xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, 100 Gbps network bandwidth, and KVM virtualization for parallel workloads.
